title: Ten Thousand Bedrooms
writer: László Vadnay, Art Cohn, William Ludwig
actors: Dean Martin, Anna Maria Alberghetti, Eva Bartok
plot: In this musical comedy, Dean Martin plays an American hotel mogul who becomes smitten with a young Italian woman (Anna Maria Alberghetti) when buying a hotel in Rome. To marry this gal, he has to get her three older sisters marrie...
